Brownfield expansion in South plant to unlock 60,000-70,000 cubic meters/year additional capacity by end of Q1 FY27.
Targeting high-teens EBITDA margin in steady state once chemical supply chain stabilizes.
New greenfield Particle Board plant planned in Orissa (timeline and capacity not finalized); old plant scrapped.
Port business (Century Ports) expected to turn cash positive in Q1 FY27.
7% price increase taken in April FY27 to offset higher timber and chemical costs; further hikes dependent on market conditions.
Industry-wide 15% price increase taken to offset chemical cost disruptions; sustainability uncertain.
Major capex directed towards Hoshiarpur plant; UP plant commissioning expected over next 2 years; no major frozen capex for MDF/Particle Board.
Long-term debt to remain below 1:1 EBITDA; focus on balance sheet discipline.
Planning muted growth of 10-12% for Plywood in FY27 due to capacity constraints and raw material sourcing.
Timber prices expected to remain stable with seasonal variations; no significant correction anticipated.
Expect further improvement in ROE and ROCE as assets are utilized more efficiently.

Particle Board capacity expansion timeline/costs (Orissa plant)
Specific FY27 volume/margin guidance for Plywood/Laminates/Particle Board
Impact of geopolitical disruptions on FY27 margins
margin_drivers: Price pass-through on raw material inflation
